title: helianthemum estevei subsp. suffruticosum
intro: Helianthemum estevei subsp. suffruticosum, also known as the rockrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum estevei subsp. suffruticosum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system and exhibit antioxidant properties. Helianthemum estevei subsp. suffruticosum is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can be used in herbal remedies in various forms, including tea, tincture, and salve.
